messages.subject: Approval to prepare Demo Training Site TDY packet
messages.body: Proceed with preparing the TDY packet for 10 soldiers attending the Demo Training Site leader development training from 10-14 June. Include lodging, rental vehicle request, roster, and per diem estimate for review.

messages.subject: Reviewer note: Demo Training Site TDY needs fund cite
messages.body: Before this routes, make sure the packet includes a fund cite or funding memo. Packets without funding evidence usually come back.

messages.subject: Funding memo attached for Demo Training Site TDY
messages.body: Attached is the synthetic funding memo for the Demo Training Site training TDY. It covers 10 travelers for 10-14 June and includes the planning line of accounting for review.
